attributes.action: Change Prime Ministers Questions to Prime Minister avoiding Questions
attributes.additional_details: Prime Ministers Questions has become a joke. Our prime minister is usually either overseas, or if here, clearly incapable of providing off the cuff answers to questions posed. He is becoming a laughing stock amongst parliamentarians, and also upon the world stage. Sadly, his failure to appear capable of the most basic duty of his job also makes the UK appear inadequate on the world stage, so by renaming, we lower the expectations of the British people and the world.
attributes.background: As our prime minister has demonstrated many times, he's incapable of answering questions in parliament. To help him avoid embarrassment it seems appropriate to retitle Prime Ministers Questions into something more appropriate, in order to lower the expectations of the public.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Introduce standards for answers to PMQs to be enforced by the Speaker
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762566
